---
name: Architecture / design improvement
about: Propose an architectural or design-level improvement
title: "[Architecture]: "
labels: ["architecture", "enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Area Affected
Which subsystem, module, or boundary is affected?

## Problem
What architectural/design issue exists today?

## Why It Matters
Why is solving this important now?

## Proposed Change
Describe the proposed design change.

## Risks / Tradeoffs
What risks, tradeoffs, or migration impacts should be considered?

## Acceptance Criteria
Define clear, testable acceptance criteria.
